characters.name: Aaron Stansfield
characters.description: Aaron StansfieldGeneral informationFull NameAaron StansfieldGenderMaleOccupationPolice Chief(Formerly)SeasonsOneSeries informationStatusAlivePortrayed ByMichael BeachFirst Appearance"Spit It Out"Last Appearance"The Best Things In Life"Last Mentioned"Vicious Vendetta"(photograph) Aaron Stansfieldis a minor character inThe CW'sDynasty. He is portrayed byMichael Beach. Stansfield was the police chief of the City of Atlanta, but indirectly worked forBlake Carringtonand often did unethical things to help him.

characters.name: Adam Carrington
characters.description: Adam CarringtonGeneral informationFull NameAdam Alexander Carrington(Birth Name)Michael Gordon Harrison(Adoptive Name)Kerlan(Current Alias)BirthplaceAtlanta, Georgia, USABirthday1988GenderMaleOccupationVeterinarianPhysician(formerly)President of theCarrington Foundation(formerly)Board Member atAtlanta General Hospital(formerly)Attending General Surgeon(formerly)COO ofCarrington Atlantic(formerly)Chief of Staff atAtlanta General(formerly)Co-Founder and CEO ofAlexam(formerly)SeasonsTwo,Three,Four,FiveRelationshipsFamilyBlake Carrington(Father)Alexis Dexter(Mother)Theresa Harrison†(Adoptive Mother)Cristal Carrington(Stepmother)Dex Dexter(Stepfather)Steven Carrington(Maternal Half-Brother)Fallon Carrington(Sister)Amanda Carrington(Sister)Thomas Carrington†(Paternal Grandfather)Evelyn Carrington†(Paternal Grandmother)Dominique Deveraux(Paternal Half-Aunt)Ben Carrington(Paternal Uncle)Lauren Carrington Ridley(Niece, viaFallon)Jeff Colby(Paternal Half-Cousin)Monica Colby(Paternal Half-Cousin)Juliette Carrington(Paternal Cousin)Liam Ridley(Brother-in-Law, viaFallon)RomancesLaura Van Kirk(Ex-Lover)Nadia(Ex-Girlfriend)Kirby Anders(Ex-Girlfriend)Stacey Moore(Ex-Girlfriend)Series informationStatusAlivePortrayed BySam UnderwoodFirst Mentioned"I Answer to No Man"First Appearance"Parisian Legend Has It..."Last Appearance"Catch 22"  Adam Alexander Carrington, M.D., F.A.C.S(formerlyMichael Gordon Harrison, and, as an alias,George EmersonandDoctor Kerlan) is a main character and main antagonist in the television seriesDynastyonThe CW. He is portrayed bySam Underwood. Adam is the charmingly unstableCarrington newcomerwith the unsettling ability to seem as normal as the situation demands. He can be both playful and obsessive. He can go from being calm to unstable in a matter of seconds, as seen when he killed his adoptive mother for lying to him about his birth family. He has a problem with liars and sees himself as the one who has to punish them for it. Upon learning thatStevenlied about trying to find his "long-lost brother", Adam concealed his identity to form a plot against Steven. This shows his ability for planning and forethought, and certainly, the patience to wait to enact his plan. Adam made Steven think he was going insane and had him committed which created the perfect opportunity for Adam to reveal himself to the rest of the Carrington family. Adam is intelligent and manipulative, yet wants only to have a family and a sense of belonging. His abandonment issues and sense of self makes it difficult for him to form important relationships. He is confident despite relying on others for self-gratification. When trying to impress Blake, Adam became obsessed and willing to do anything to prove himself a loyal son. He even poisonedJeff Colbyand attempted to tamper evidence to assist in Blake'smurder trial. Adam wants to help others, as shown by his desire to be a doctor, but often sabotages his good intentions with a morally compromised idea. He can be blind wh

Adam is intelligent and manipulative, yet wants only to have a family and a sense of belonging. His abandonment issues and sense of self makes it difficult for him to form important relationships. He is confident despite relying on others for self-gratification. When trying to impress Blake, Adam became obsessed and willing to do anything to prove himself a loyal son. He can be blind when it comes to relationships, especially his budding romance withKirby Ander

characters.name: Adriana
characters.description: AdrianaGeneral informationFull NameAdrianaGenderFemaleOccupationPsychicSeasonsTwoRelationshipsRomancesUnnamed FiancéSeries informationStatusAlivePortrayed ByHarriet Sansom HarrisAppeared in"Queen of Cups" Adrianais an episodic character onThe CW'sDynasty. She is portrayed byHarriet Sansom Harris. Adriana is a psychic introduced to the Carringtons byCristal Jenningswho gives insight to the family's future, particularly when it comes to matriarch,Alexis Carrington.

characters.name: Alejandro Raya
characters.description: Alejandro RayaGeneral informationFull NameAlejandro Raya(Legal Name)Diego Calastana(Alias)BirthplaceCaracas, VenezuelaGenderMaleSeasonsOneRelationshipsFamilySam Jones(Legal Son/Stepson)Celia Machado†(Sister-in-Law)RomancesIris Machado(Wife/Widow)Series informationStatusDeceasedPortrayed ByLuis FernandezFirst Appearance"The Best Things In Life"(flashback)"Rotten Things"Last Appearance"I Answer to No Man" Alejandro Raya, also known asDiego Calastana, is a minor character inThe CW'sDynasty. He is portrayed byLuis Fernandez. Alejandro wasIris Machado's husband and father of their sonSammy.Celia, Iris' sister, lived with them in Caracas, Venezuela. When Iris said to Alejandro that her sister was pregnant and that they have to take cared of another baby, he was furious and beat her. Trying to separate them, Celia stabbed Alejandro in the back. She then came to a new life in the United States, thinking she has killed him.

characters.name: Alexis Carrington Colby
characters.description: Alexis DexterCurrentOriginalGeneral informationFull NameAlexis Morell(Maiden)Alexis Carrington(First Marital)Alexis Colby(Second Marital)Alexis Dexter(Third Marital)BirthplaceAtlanta, GeorgiaBirthdayJune 12, 1963GenderFemaleOccupationSocialitePodcaster ofAunt Alexis(Formerly)Founder & CEO ofAlexamShow Host onFSN(Formerly)AlexamBoutique OwnerSeasonsOne,Two,Three,Four,FiveRelationshipsFamilyUnnamed FatherUnnamed MotherAdam Carrington(Son, viaBlake)Steven Carrington(Son, viaJoseph)Fallon Carrington(Daughter, via Blake)Amanda Carrington(Daughter, via Blake)Lauren Carrington Ridley(Granddaughter, viaFallon)Unnamed Great-Grandfather †[1]Unnamed Cousin †[2]Maude(Great Aunt)[3]Liam Ridley(Son-in-Law, via Fallon)Samir Dexter(Father-in-Law)RomancesUnnamed Ex-Fiancé[4]Blake Carrington(Ex-Husband)Paul Daniels(Affair)Nikolai Dimitrov(Affair)Joseph Anders†(One Night Stand)Gabriel Jurgens(Affair)Rupert †(Ex-Lover)[5]Hank Sullivan(Ex-Lover)Jeff Colby(Ex-Husband)Nolan Jamison(Date)Dex Dexter(Husband)Series informationStatusAlivePortrayed ByNicollette Sheridan(1.16-2.15)Elizabeth Gillies(2.17-2.19)Elaine Hendrix(3.08-5.22)First Appearance"I Hardly Recognized You"(uncredited cameo)"Poor Little Rich Girl"Last Appearance"Catch 22" Unnamed FatherUnnamed MotherAdam Carrington(Son, viaBlake)Steven Carrington(Son, viaJoseph)Fallon Carrington(Daughter, via Blake)Amanda Carrington(Daughter, via Blake)Lauren Carrington Ridley(Granddaughter, viaFallon)Unnamed Great-Grandfather †[1]Unnamed Cousin †[2]Maude(Great Aunt)[3]Liam Ridley(Son-in-Law, via Fallon)Samir Dexter(Father-in-Law) Unnamed Ex-Fiancé[4]Blake Carrington(Ex-Husband)Paul Daniels(Affair)Nikolai Dimitrov(Affair)Joseph Anders†(One Night Stand)Gabriel Jurgens(Affair)Rupert †(Ex-Lover)[5]Hank Sullivan(Ex-Lover)Jeff Colby(Ex-Husband)Nolan Jamison(Date)Dex Dexter(Husband) Alexis is scheming, conniving, narcissistic, and ruthless when it comes to getting what she wants. She always has a plan or tricks up her sleeve. She was absent from her children's lives for years and was considered non-maternal for not reaching out to her children for over a decade. Unlike Blake, Alexis has acknowledged her mistakes as a parent and even tried to make up for them. Despite her many questionable traits and constant meddling with her children, she will occasionally demonstrate twisted acts of love[13]for her children. Fallon and Steven have come to realize these acts are Alexis's version of motherly love - even though they included harming others. According to many, Fallon and Alexis have a very similar personality ... both are brave, intelligent, determined, tough, narcissistic and often ruthless, according to Blake. When it comes to her relationships, Alexis pined over Blake for years, partly because of his wealth and status but as time passed she learned to love him for how he was. When she returned years later, she didn't let the fact he had remarried stop her from pining over him again. She attempted to ruin his relationship with Cel
characters.personality_section: Alexis is scheming, conniving, narcissistic, and ruthless when it comes to getting what she wants. She always has a plan or tricks up her sleeve. She was absent from her children's lives for years and was considered non-maternal for not reaching out to her children for over a decade. Unlike Blake, Alexis has acknowledged her mistakes as a parent and even tried to make up for them. Despite her many questionable traits and constant meddling with her children, she will occasionally demonstrate twisted acts of love[13]for her children. Fallon and Steven have come to realize these acts are Alexis's version of motherly love - even though they included harming others. According to many, Fallon and Alexis have a very similar personality ... both are brave, intelligent, determined, tough, narcissistic and often ruthless, according to Blake. When it comes to her relationships, Alexis pined over Blake for years, partly because of his wealth and status but as time passed she learned to love him for how he was. When she returned years later, she didn't let the fact he had remarried stop her from pining over him again. She attempted to ruin his relationship with Celia by using petty antics, lies, and deceit to sway him back to herself. She even went as far as hiring a con artist to pretend to be their then-kidnapped sonin an attempt to gain power and Blake's affections. She was later callous toward her real son out of fear that her secrets would resurface. After all of her lies and treache

characters.description: AllegraGeneral informationFull NameAllegraGenderFemaleRelationshipsFamilyFallon Carrington(Owner)Series informationStatusAlivePortrayed ByUnknownFirst Appearance"A Real Actress Could Do It"Last Appearance"The Only Thing That Counts Is Winning" Allegrais a horse inThe CW'sDynasty. characters.name: Amanda Carrington
characters.description: Amanda CarringtonGeneral informationFull NameAmanda Carrington(Legal Name)Amanda Bedford(Adoptive Name, formerly)BirthplaceLondon, EnglandBirthdaySeptember, 1996GenderFemaleAge24-25(Season 4)25-26(Season 5)OccupationAssociate SolicitorLawyer Associate at Buckley Chance(formerly)Legal Counsel atPrimetime Private Air(formerly)Legal Counsel atAtlanta General Hospital(formerly)SeasonsFour,FiveRelationshipsFamilyBlake Carrington(Father)Alexis Dexter(Mother)Unnamed Adoptive Mother †Unnamed Adoptive FatherCelia Machado†(Stepmother)Cristal Carrington(Stepmother)Dex Dexter(Stepfather)Adam Carrington(Brother)Steven Carrington(Half-Brother)Fallon Carrington(Sister)Thomas Carrington†(Paternal Grandfather)Evelyn Carrington†(Paternal Grandmother)Dominique Deveraux(Paternal Half-Aunt)Ben Carrington(Paternal Uncle)Lauren Carrington Ridley(Niece, viaFallon)Jeff Colby(Paternal Half-Cousin)Monica Colby(Paternal Half-Cousin)Juliette Carrington(Paternal Cousin)Liam Ridley(Brother-in-Law, via Fallon)RomancesFlorence Whitley(Ex-Girlfriend)Kirby Anders(Girlfriend)Series informationStatusAlivePortrayed ByEliza BennettFirst Mentioned"Equal Justice for the Rich"First Appearance"The British Are Coming"Last Appearance"Catch 22" Amanda Bedford(Adoptive Name, formerly) Blake Carrington(Father)Alexis Dexter(Mother)Unnamed Adoptive Mother †Unnamed Adoptive FatherCelia Machado†(Stepmother)Cristal Carrington(Stepmother)Dex Dexter(Stepfather)Adam Carrington(Brother)Steven Carrington(Half-Brother)Fallon Carrington(Sister)Thomas Carrington†(Paternal Grandfather)Evelyn Carrington†(Paternal Grandmother)Dominique Deveraux(Paternal Half-Aunt)Ben Carrington(Paternal Uncle)Lauren Carrington Ridley(Niece, viaFallon)Jeff Colby(Paternal Half-Cousin)Monica Colby(Paternal Half-Cousin)Juliette Carrington(Paternal Cousin)Liam Ridley(Brother-in-Law, via Fallon) Amanda is brilliantly intellectual with a sense of class, dignity, and self. She knows how she should be treated and doesn't accept manipulations, lies, or deceit from either of her parents. She is slightly gullible in that she takes both Blake and Alexis at their words, though she doesn't know better. However, Amanda doesn't hesitate to retaliate when Adam's antics nearly cost her a job at an aviation company, and she hatches a diabolical plan to not only get revenge, but get even. She accepts heartfelt apologies and offers forgiveness for those who have wronged her.

She accepts heartfelt apologies and offers forgiveness for those who have wronged her.
characters.personality_section: Amanda is brilliantly intellectual with a sense of class, dignity, and self. She knows how she should be treated and doesn't accept manipulations, lies, or deceit from either of her parents. She is slightly gullible in that she takes both Blake and Alexis at their words, though she doesn't know better. However, Amanda doesn't hesitate to retaliate when Adam's antics nearly cost her a job at an aviation company, and she hatches a diabolical plan to not only get revenge, but get even. She accepts heartfelt apologies and offers forgiveness for those who have wronged her.

characters.name: Angeria Paris VanMichaels
characters.description: Angeria Paris VanMichaelsBackground Information:BirthdateJuly 25, 1993NationalityAmericanOccupationActress, Drag PerformerYears Active2022-presentCharacterAngeria Paris VanMichaelsSocial Media:TwitterAngeriavmInstagramangeriavmOtherwebsite Angeria Paris VanMichaelsis an American drag performer and one of the contestants of the fourteenth season ofRuPaul's Drag Race. She portrayed a version of herself in thefifth seasonofThe CW'sDynasty. VanMichaels was born in Sparta, Georgia. Her drag name originated in college, originally "Angera", the "I" was added before the "A" to make it fancier.

characters.name: Ashanti
characters.description: AshantiBackground Information:Birth NameAshanti Shequoiya DouglasBirthdateOctober 13, 1980NationalityAmericanOccupationSinger, Songwriter, Record producer, Model, Dancer & ActressYears Active1989–presentCharacterHerselfSocial Media:Twitter@ashantiInstagram@ashantiOtherAshanti IMDBAshanti Shequoiya Douglasbetter known synonimously asAshanti, is an American singer, songwriter, record producer, model, dancer, and actress. She was first discovered as a teenager and later signed to Murder Inc. in late 2001. She portrayed a version of herself inSeason 3ofDynasty. Aside from music, Ashanti has also acted in various productions. In 2005, she made her feature film debut inCoach Carteralongside Samuel L. Jackson, as well as starring as Dorothy Gale in the made-for-television filmThe Muppets' Wizard of Oz, which pulled in nearly 8 million viewers when it premiered. She has since appeared in the filmsJohny Tucker Must Diein 2006, andResident Evil: Extinctionin 2007. InMother? I'm at La Mirage, Sam was putting everything into the opening of his hotel. He practically stalked Ashanti in order to get her to come and he was doing his best to get her to perform as well. It had all been a part of his plan. Sam wanted the night to be perfect for everyone, so he had been really been on the edge and he didn’t need anyone playing games at his opening. As luck would have it,Vanessa Deveraux, the new bartender atLa Mirageserved Ashanti a drink, which caused her to feel ill. This lead to Ashanti being unable to perform at the opening. Vanessa managed to grab a microphone and she gave her own performance after sabotaging Ashanti at the last minute.

characters.name: Bo
characters.description: BoGeneral informationFull NameBo CarringtonBirthplaceAtlanta, Georgia(presumably)GenderMaleSeasonsOne,Two,Three,FiveRelationshipsFamilyBlake Carrington(Caregiver)Steven Carrington(Caregiver)Fallon Carrington(Caregiver)Joseph Anders†(Caregiver)Celia Machado†(Caregiver)Sam Jones(Caregiver)Cristal Carrington(Caregiver)Kirby Anders(Caregiver)Series informationPortrayed ByAidenofAnimal Casting Atlanta[1]First Appearance"I Hardly Recognized You"Last Appearance"Mind Your Own Business""Catch 22"(voice) Bois a recurring character onThe CW'sDynasty. He is a male Bloodhound dog, adopted by the Carringtons forStevenandFallonafter their mother,Alexis, leaves the family. WhenAlexis Carringtonexits Atlanta, leaving her children behind,Blakeadopts Bo, a Bloodhound, forStevenandFallon, to provide comfort and fill the void left by their absent mother.("Don't Con a Con Artist")

characters.name: Bobbi Johnson
characters.description: Bobbi JohnsonGeneral informationFull NameBobbi JohnsonGenderFemaleOccupationPolice chiefSeasonsOneRelationshipsFamilyJeff Colby(Cousin)Monica Colby(Cousin)Series informationStatusAlivePortrayed ByKearran GiovanniAppeared in"I Answer to No Man" Bobbi Johnsonis an episodic character inThe CW'sDynasty. She is portrayed byKearran Giovanni. Bobbi Johnson is the cousin ofJeff ColbyandMonica Colby. She is the new Police Chief of the City of Atlanta and replacesChief Stansfield, who left town with money from her cousin. Her first major investigation was Fallon Carrington's kidnap.("I Answer to No Man")
